analytics-service/Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the Maven build base image from Eclipse Temurin to Amazon Corretto JDK 21.
Switch the runtime base image from OpenJDK to Amazon Corretto Alpine JDK 21.
Change the exposed container port from 5003 to 8080 to align with standard service configuration.

analytics-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property in the Maven POM to target JDK 21.
analytics-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against JDK 17, failing to utilize JDK 21 features or enforce JDK 21 compatibility.

api-gateway/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
api-gateway/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce compatibility with the target runtime.

api-gateway/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit version constraint for Lombok in the dependency exclusion block.

api-gateway/src/main/java/com/meditrack/.general_idea: Refactor JWT decoder configuration to support both JWK and Secret Key authentication methods conditionally.
Remove unused @Profile annotation from the configuration class.

auth-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 17 to 21 to align with the JDK 21 migration.
auth-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 17 features, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 language features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if Java 21-specific APIs are used.

auth-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit version constraint from the Lombok dependency exclusion to rely on the managed version.

auth-service/src/main/java/com/meditrack.general_idea: Uncomment and activate the SecurityFilterChain bean to explicitly configure Spring Security, replacing the deprecated default behavior that caused 401 errors in newer Spring Security versions.
auth-service/src/main/java/com/meditrack.why_exists: Spring Security 5.7+ (and strictly enforced in 6.x) requires explicit SecurityFilterChain configuration; without it, the default strict security policy blocks all requests, resulting in 401 Unauthorized errors for endpoints that should be public or handled by custom filters.
auth-service/src/main/java/com/meditrack.before:
//    @Bean
//    public SecurityFilterChain securityFilterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception{
auth-service/src/main/java/com/meditrack.after:
@Bean
    public SecurityFilterChain securityFilterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception{

auth-service/src/main/java/com/meditrack.general_idea: Remove the unused 'membership' field from the UserLoginResponse DTO.
Rename the database table from 'userDetails' to 'user_details' to follow snake_case naming conventions.
Remove the 'membership' field from the UserEntity class.

billing-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 17 to 21 to align with the JDK 21 migration.

patient-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 17 to 21 to align with the JDK 21 migration.
patient-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 17 standards, potentially missing out on JDK 21 features or causing version mismatch warnings/errors if the build environment enforces JDK 21 compliance.
